fragment:
<set-variable name="subscription-name" value="@{
		var authType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("auth-type", "none");
		return authType.Equals("api-key", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ? (context.Subscription?.Name ?? "api-key-anonymous") : authType.Equals("jwt", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ? "jwt-auth" : "anonymous";
	}" />
	
	
		
		
		
		<when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("auth-type", string.Empty).Equals("api-key", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))">
			
				
					
						
						
							application/json
						
						Access denied due to missing or invalid API key.
					
				
			
				
				<set-variable name="user-id" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("subscription-name", "api-key-user"))" />
			
			
			
				@($"UAIG - API-Key authenticated request {context.Variables["subscription-name"]} accessing {context.Request.Url.Path}")
			
		
		
		<when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("auth-type", string.Empty).Equals("jwt", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))">
			
			
			
			
			
			
				<when condition="@{
					var audience = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwt-audience");
					var openidConfig = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwt-openid-config");
					var issuer = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwt-issuer");
					return string.IsNullOrEmpty(audience) || string.IsNullOrEmpty(openidConfig) || string.IsNullOrEmpty(issuer);
				}">
					
						
						
							application/json
						
						JWT authentication is not configured properly.
				
			
		
		
		
			
				<openid-config url="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwt-openid-config"))" />
				
					@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwt-audience"))
				
				
					@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwt-issuer"))
				
			
			
			
			
			
			
			<set-variable name="subscription-name" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("user-id", "anonymous"))" />
			
				@($"UAIG - JWT authenticated request {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("user-id", "anonymous")} accessing {context.Request.Url.Path}")
			
		
		
		
			
				@($"UAIG - Unauthenticated request to {context.Request.Method} {context.Request.Url.Path} from {context.Request.IpAddress}")
			
			
				
				
					application/json
				
				Authentication required. Provide an API key via 'api-key' header or a JWT bearer token via 'Authorization' header.
			
		
	
	
	
	
	
		@("Bearer " + context.Variables["managed-id-access-token"])
